title: β-Ga₂O₃ & Diamond Research Hub
subtitle: Central index for gallium oxide and diamond research. Papers are regularly updated and organized.

sections.title: Research Topics
sections.intro: Tag-controlled research clusters. Select a folder marker, scan the middle-level rows, and open a low-level topic panel without leaving this page.

sections.title: Research Toolkit
sections.intro: Quick-access tools, calculators, and workflow helpers for daily research.

cards.title: XRD Peaks
cards.desc: Google, ChatGPT giving you a bunch of useless XRD peaks? Try this instead!

cards.title: Plot & Fit Helper
cards.desc: Quick plotting templates and fit checks for repeated datasets.

cards.title: Equation Reference
cards.desc: A compact library of key equations used across your notes.

cards.title: EndNote Citation Converter
cards.desc: Convert raw EndNote citation blocks into JSON-safe citationRaw strings.

sections.title: Know Your Peers
sections.intro: Research groups organized by material system, so the hub can grow cleanly across β-Ga₂O₃ and diamond growth work.

cards.title: Bhuiyan Group
cards.desc: LPCVD-grown β-Ga₂O₃, device-oriented etching strategies, and high-mobility vertical SBDs.

cards.title: Zhao Labs
cards.desc: MOCVD β-Ga₂O₃ epitaxy, defect engineering, and mobility optimization in thin films.

cards.title: Krishnamoorthy Group
cards.desc: β-Ga₂O₃ device physics, breakdown engineering, and field-management strategies for power devices.

cards.title: Pearton Group
cards.desc: Defect spectroscopy, etching, and reliability studies in β-Ga₂O₃ and related UWBG materials.

cards.title: Srabanti Chowdhury Group
cards.desc: Diamond growth, wide-bandgap materials, and device-oriented epitaxy research.

cards.title: Ariful Haque Group
cards.affiliation: Research group profile to be linked
cards.desc: Diamond growth and plasma-assisted materials research cluster placeholder.

cards.title: Samuel Graham Group
cards.desc: Thermal transport, wide-bandgap materials, diamond-related heat spreading, and device integration research.
